---
title: "Plotly example"
format: html
editor: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
execute:
  echo: false  
---

```{r}
#| include: false

library(tidyverse)
library(plotly)

theme_set(theme_bw())


```

```{r}
#| include: false

ds <- read_csv("data/fruits_long.csv")

```

```{r}

pl <- ds |> 
  count(fruit, sort = TRUE) |>
  
  ggplot(aes(x = fruit, y = n, text = fruit)) + 
  
  geom_col(fill = "steelblue") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(x = "Fruit", y = "Count") 

ggplotly(pl)

```
